title: Get details of audience overlap
content:
Use this endpoint to get the details of the audience overlap between the benchmark audience and up to four other TikTok Custom Audience segments. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/audience/insight/overlap/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID.| |benchmark_custom_audience_id {Required}|string|The ID of the custom audience that you select as the benchmark audience.

Note: The audience ID that you input here must be accessible by your advertiser ID. Otherwise, an error will occur.| |comparison_custom_audience_ids|string[]|The IDs of the custom audience that you select as the comparison audience.
Max size: 4.

Note: The audience IDs that you input here must be accessible by your advertiser ID. Otherwise, an error will occur.| ``` ## Example ``` xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/audience/insight/overlap/' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --data '{ "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "benchmark_custom_audience_id": "{{benchmark_custom_audience_id}}", "comparison_custom_audience_ids": [ "{{comparison_custom_audience_ids}}", "{{comparison_custom_audience_ids}}", "{{comparison_custom_audience_ids}}", "{{comparison_custom_audience_ids}}" ] }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Return code, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Return message, see [Appendix-Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log id of a request, which uniquely identifies the request.| |data |object|Returned Data.

Note: Audience sizes fewer than 1,000 will not be displayed.| #|benchmark_audience|object|Benchmark audience data.| ##|audience_id|string|Audience ID.| ##|audience_name|string|Audience name.| ##|audience_size|int|Audience size.| ##|targetable_users_count_range|string|The size range of users in the custom audience who have been active in the last 30 days and can be targeted.| #|comparison_audiences|object[]|Comparison audience data.
Returned if you have input `comparison_custom_audience_ids` in your request.| ##|audience_id|string|Audience ID.| ##|audience_name|string|Audience name.| ##|audience_size|int|Audience size.| ##|targetable_users_count_range|string|The size range of users in the custom audience who have been active in the last 30 days and can be targeted.| ##|benchmark_overlap_rate|string|The base percentage of users from the benchmark audience that are available in the comparison audience.| ##|benchmark_overlap_rate_range|string|The percentage range of users from the benchmark audience that are available in the comparison audience.| ##|benchmark_overlap_count_range|string|The size range of users from the benchmark audience that are available in the comparison audience.| ``` ## Example ``` xcodeblock (code curl http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "benchmark_audience": { "audience_id": "{{audience_id}}", "audience_name": "{{audience_name}}", "audience_size": 29690526, "targetable_users_count_range": "15,428,000-18,857,000" }, "comparison_audiences": [ { "audience_id": "{{audience_id}}", "audience_name": "{{audience_name}}", "audience_size": 4754, "targetable_users_count_range": "1,000-2,000", "benchmark_overlap_rate": "3%", "benchmark_overlap_rate_range": "0%", "benchmark_overlap_count_range": "< 1,000" }, { "audience_id": "{{audience_id}}", "audience_name": "{{audience_name}}", "audience_size": 504, "targetable_users_count_range": "1,000-2,000", "benchmark_overlap_rate": "3%", "benchmark_overlap_rate_range": "0%", "benchmark_overlap_count_range": "< 1,000" }, { "audience_id": "{{audience_id}}", "audience_name": "{{audience_name}}", "audience_size": 51090, "targetable_users_count_range": "25,000-31,000", "benchmark_overlap_rate": "3%", "benchmark_overlap_rate_range": "0%", "benchmark_overlap_count_range": "< 1,000" }, { "audience_id": "{{audience_id}}", "audience_name": "{{audience_name}}", "audience_size": 19449461, "targetable_users_count_range": "12,179,000-14,885,000", "benchmark_overlap_rate": "7%", "benchmark_overlap_rate_range": "6%-9%", "benchmark_overlap_count_range": "1,156,000-1,413,000" } ] } }' (/code) ```
